meaning: 真菌类(包括霉菌,食用伞菌,酵母菌等),似真菌的,由真菌引起的
examples: Ferns, mosses and fungi spread by means of spores.
In the forest, fungi are decomposers.
Those fungi, in turn, broke down the carbohydrates in the foods back into simple sugars.
Strobel, often accompanied by his wife, Susan, has hunted fungi in at least two dozen jungles.
